name: macOS Debug Menu Runtime Wiring (E2E)
descriptions: Wire existing debug contracts into live AppKit menu behavior for macOS example apps with crash-safe dispatch, policy enforcement, and deterministic smoke evidence.
success_criteria: Clicking default macOS top-menu actions never crashes.
Debug menu actions are functional in a live example app session.
Legacy apps without debug policy block behave unchanged.
debug_policy controls are enforced in live runtime path.
End-to-end smoke run produces deterministic evidence (logs + capture artifacts).
Rollback flag can disable new wiring safely.

closeout_criteria.metric_description: macOS menu wiring stability/compatibility go-no-go score.
hard_no_go_conditions: any menu click path can crash process
legacy behavior regression when debug policy is absent
rollback flag cannot safely disable wiring
required_evidence: example app smoke logs and artifact manifest
required_commands: uv run --with pytest pytest tests -k "debug_menu_dispatch or debug_manifest_policy or macos_menu_integration" -q
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python main.py run-app examples/app_protocol/planes_v2_poc --render macos --ticks 120
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python main.py run-app examples/app_protocol/input_sensor_logger --render macos --ticks 120

ci_required_checks: uv run --with pytest pytest tests -k "debug_menu_dispatch or debug_manifest_policy or macos_menu_integration" -q
